meta.description: A joinery atelier for made-to-measure furniture and interiors. Detail, precision and quality — pieces designed and built with rigour for architecture and interiors.

hero.lead: Made-to-measure furniture, designed and built with rigour.

values.title: Four principles, one way of working

bespoke.title: Bespoke
bespoke.text: Every piece is born from the space and the people who live in it, drawn from scratch and never picked from a catalogue. We measure, we listen, and only then we design.

rigor.title: Rigour
rigor.text: We work to millimetre tolerances, with joints built to last for decades. What you don't see is as considered as what stays in view.

materials.title: Materials
materials.text: We choose noble timbers, veneers and lacquers for their honesty, their grain and their touch. Matter is the first detail of every piece.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.text: From the first drawing to installation, nothing is left to chance. The same team that designs the piece sees it through to the last screw.

catalog.title: Pieces that order the space
catalog.lead: A selection of made-to-measure furniture — kitchens, wardrobes and interiors conceived as architecture.

projects.title: Spaces where timber is structure
projects.lead: Complete interventions in homes, apartments and commercial spaces.

work.title: From the piece to the space
work.lead: Made-to-measure furniture and complete interventions — in timber.

process.title: From first sketch to last screw.
process.lead: A linear, transparent process, guided at every stage.

consult.title: Consultation
consult.text: We listen to the space, the use and the ambition.

design.title: Design
design.text: Technical drawing and visualisation. Materials and finishes defined.

production.title: Production
production.text: Workshop fabrication with piece-by-piece quality control.

install.title: Installation
install.text: Clean, precise assembly with final tuning on site.

materials.title: Matter is the first detail
materials.lead: We work solid timbers, veneers and lacquers — chosen for durability, grain and touch.

cta.title: Have a space in mind?
cta.lead: Tell us the idea. We reply with a plan, a quote and a timeline.

catalogPage.title: Furniture made to your measure
catalogPage.lead: Pieces built to last. Filter by type, search or sort.

projectsPage.title: A singular selection of work
projectsPage.lead: A selection of finished interventions. Filter by type or search.

catalogDetail.ctaLead: Get in touch and we'll take your project from concept to installation.

projectDetail.ctaLead: Get in touch and we'll take your project from concept to installation.

about.title: Obsessed with detail
about.intro: Pedro Cunha Carpintaria — made-to-measure furniture and timber interiors. From concept to the millimetre.

presence.lead: We design, build and install with the same care in every detail, wherever the project is.

what.title: Furniture and interiors, made to measure
what.lead: We design and build every piece from scratch — from concept to installation.

furniture.title: Bespoke furniture
furniture.text: Unique pieces, shaped to the space and the people in it.

kitchens.title: Kitchens
kitchens.text: Functional and silent, built to last for decades.

wardrobes.title: Wardrobes & walk-ins
wardrobes.text: Storage designed to the detail, with no waste.

interiors.title: Interiors
interiors.text: Panelling, libraries and joinery that define the space.

history.title: History
history.text: We were born from the conviction that furniture is not decoration — it is architecture at the scale of the gesture. We started in a small workshop and grew without ever diluting the standard. Every project is treated as if it were the first to be seen and the last to endure.

approach.title: Approach
approach.text: We make the right piece for the right space.

method.title: Method
method.text: In-house technical drawing, prototyping when needed, workshop fabrication and installation by the same team that built the piece. No intermediaries between the idea and the result.

materialsPage.title: Timbers, finishes and details
materialsPage.lead: The choice of material is the first design decision. These are our materials of choice.

oak.name: Oak
oak.text: Open grain and quiet nobility. Structure and presence.

walnut.name: Walnut
walnut.text: Deep tones and rich figure. For signature pieces.

ash.name: Ash
ash.text: Pale, fibrous and resilient. Light and lightness.

oakSmoked.name: Smoked oak
oakSmoked.text: Dark character drawn from the timber's natural reaction.

oil.name: Natural oil
oil.text: Matte, tactile touch. Protects without hiding the grain.

matte.name: Matte lacquer
matte.text: Continuous surface, solid colour, zero sheen.

veneer.name: Veneer
veneer.text: The beauty of solid timber with dimensional stability.

soap.name: Soap
soap.text: Nordic tradition: pale, silky and alive to the touch.

joinery.name: Joinery
joinery.text: Dovetails and tenons on show when the detail deserves to be seen.

edges.name: Edges
edges.text: Calibrated corners and constant radii across the whole piece.

hardware.name: Hardware
hardware.text: Hidden mechanisms and silent opening, handleless where possible.

grain.name: Grain continuity
grain.text: Continuous figure across doors and drawers, as if the piece were a single block.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Tell us what you have in mind. We reply within 24–48 business hours.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe the space, the idea and your timeline.
form.success: Message sent. We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Couldn't send. Please try again or contact us directly.

form.ptOnlyNote: Write in Portuguese — English and French are translated automatically.
